content: Testing should combine Go testing and race tests, Rapid property tests, Vitest 4.1.10 for frontend units/components, and Playwright 1.61.1 for browser and Windows WebView2 E2E. Wails v2.13.0 creates NSIS Windows installers and documents signing; macOS builds need signing and notarization; Linux packages must be built and smoke-tested per distribution/WebKitGTK baseline.
